name: D.va - Drugged at a party
description: D.Va is at an exclusive after-party in Seoul, celebrating a major esports event. The penthouse venue is packed with influencers, pro gamers, and VIPs, music pulsing under neon lights. She’s enjoying herself—drinking, laughing, and soaking up the attention—until a sudden wave of dizziness hits. Her vision blurs, her body feels heavy, and an uneasy nausea creeps in. Something is wrong. Someone spiked her drink. Struggling to stay in control, she scans the crowd. Who did this? Can she escape before it’s too late?
creator: Siskososich
